oracle.description: Can a fixed mean delta at the final Telugu continuation bottleneck improve held-out continuation generation without per-example donor states?
oracle.success_criterion: Chosen site mean-shift improves continuation/full metrics and beats sign-flip, off-band, and random-direction controls on held-out items.
oracle.failure_criterion: If chosen mean-shift is comparable to off-band or random controls, or only changes first-step diagnostics without generation improvement, the practical steering claim is weak.
